NationalCherryCheesecakeDay.haiku:
Juicy red jewels gleam,
Creamy clouds on a plate,
Forks meet blissful dreams.
Happy #NationalCherryCheesecakeDay from @ClamBakeSanta

WorldBookDay.haiku:
Pages turn like leaves,
Whispers of adventure,
Worlds awaken wide.
Happy #WorldBookDay from @ClamBakeSanta

HappyBirthdayWilliamShakespeare.haiku:
Quills dance on parchment,
Ink spills tales like summer rain,
Joy in every word.
#HappyBirthdayWilliamShakespeare from @ClamBakeSanta

HappyBirthdayJamesBuchanan.haiku:
Whispers of the breeze,
Laughter blooms like wildflowers,
Joy fills every heart.
#HappyBirthdayJamesBuchanan from @ClamBakeSanta
